_comment: NPC: Wang Hao (王浩). Canon ID: N06. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wang Hao

personality_traits._comment: NOVEL_STATEMENT: friendly fellow disciple (CANON_RI N06), helpful, moderate courage, high loyalty to friends.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Hey! You're that new disciple, right? Welcome to Heng Yue. If anyone gives you trouble, come find me.
The food hall's best meals are right after dawn. The senior disciples take the good portions first, so get there early!
Don't mind Sun Dazhu. He bullies everyone. Just stay out of his way until you're strong enough to ignore him.

sect_tasks.description: Wang Hao grins and flexes: 'The morning sparring session wiped out my arrows and leather armor patches. If you bring replacements, I will share some of the food I saved from the dining hall — the good portions, not the gruel.'
Wang Hao whispers: 'I missed the dawn meal because Sun Dazhu blocked the door again. If you bring bread, I will pay you back with emeralds from my last mission reward. Please — I am starving.'
